## [12:09 - 15:10]

And a behavior can be then broken down into smaller desired responses. Take into consideration the level of complexity for the skill being taught to the dog you love, and build in the necessary layers of foundation to bring you to the success you desire. The fifth and final key in your inspired training framework is to be strategic in how you build value for correct choices, and at the rate you increase that complexity in your training. We often refer to the early stages of training around here as value building stages. Here, you've got to manipulate the dog's environment so that the obvious choice, the choice that you want your dog to make, is extremely easy and attractive to the dog. The wrong choice, although difficult, is never going to be impossible because we do want to see the dog make his own what choice.
